creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Please notice that this is a English only mailinglist and the 
information you posted is not very informative (at least not for me) so 
can you please describe a bit better what the idea is? Also isn't
this a ports issue since samba has this problem or?

Thanks for the explaination in advance,
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
